tasks.instruction:
Fix scrolling issues and improve layouts across all screens in the Invoice Accounting System. The current layout has scrolling problems on all pages. Need to:
1. Fix scrolling functionality on all screens (Dashboard, Invoices, Payments, Allocation, Reports, Buyers, Brokers, Users)
2. Improve overall layout design and user experience
3. Ensure proper responsive design
4. Fix table overflow and scrolling within containers
5. Optimize spacing, padding, and visual hierarchy
6. Ensure all content is accessible and scrollable when needed
Technology stack: Shadcn-ui, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
